proposal_summary: This proposal requests the Uniswap Foundation to delegate a total of 10 million UNI to 7 active but underrepresented delegates to increase active participation and robust governance. Delegates must maintain an 80% participation rate.

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: this proposal requests the Uniswap Foundation delegate in total 10 million UNI to 7 active yet underrepresented delegates.

disclosed_entities.name: Franchiser contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: is subject to undelegation via the Franchiser contract explained below

disclosed_entities.name: FranchiserFactory
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: one function call on the FranchiserFactory contract here (https://etherscan.io/address/0xf754A7E347F81cFdc70AF9FbCCe9Df3D826360FA)

disclosed_entities.name: Timelock
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The Timelock will call the fundMany function

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Distribute voting power to active delegates
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: delegate in total 10 million UNI to 7 active yet underrepresented delegates

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: deploys a Franchiser contract for each delegate and funds it
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The Timelock will call the fundMany function, and pass it two arrays of calldata

claimed_complexity.reason: Uses a factory contract to deploy individual delegator contracts for 7 recipients.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: one function call on the FranchiserFactory contract ... The Timelock will call the fundMany function, and pass it two arrays of calldata. ... The result of that function call will be an individual Franchiser contract deployed for each delegate

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: The Timelock will call the fundMany function
recall the tokens by calling the recall function

limitations: Could not resolve the exact ABI or exact calldata array parameters strictly.
